machine_start_gcode:
G90 ; use absoulte coordinates
M83 ; extruder relative mode

M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; set bed temp
M190 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; wait for bed temp to stabilize
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] ; set final extruder temp
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] ; wait for extruder temp

G28 ; home all axes
BED_MESH_CALIBRATE ADAPTIVE=1; new mesh
M420 S1 ;load mesh

G1 X0.1 Y10 Z20.0 F1800 ; move to above the start position

G1 X0.3 Y10 Z5.0 F1500 ; move to start position
G1 Z0.3 F150 ; Move lower
G4 S0.5 ; wait 0.5 seconds

G1 X0.3 Y150 Z0.3 F1500 E20 ; prime the nozzle
G1 X0.5 F1500
G1 X0.5 Y15 Z0.3 F1500 E22 ; prime the nozzle
G4 S0.1 ; wait 0.1 seconds

G1 Z0.6 F150 ; lift nozzle
G92 E0 ; Reset Extruder
G1 Z2 F150 ; lift nozzle more
name: SV06 Plus 0.6
